creator: nemysis@gmx.ch
text:
Capitalism is a Client for the Monopd server.
You can play Monopoly like games with it.

WWW: http://www.linux-ecke.de/Capitalism/
WWW: http://sourceforge.net/projects/capitalism/

Generated and tested manually, tested with port test and with RedPorts (all RELEASES, CLANG), sent with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: new)

How-To-Repeat: 
portlint -A
looks fine.

port test: clean

Build log

https://redports.org/buildarchive/20121104181123-41313/
